pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 57: product created via Odoo API with name 'Centrifugal Pump CP-200'
setup_task.sh lines 67-69: product created and stock explicitly set to 0 (out of stock)

setup_task.sh line 164: setup data written to this file path; same file referenced in export_result.sh line 10 and 28

privileged_info_summary: The task uses entirely synthetic data created programmatically via Odoo XML-RPC API. The task creates four products: Centrifugal Pump CP-200 (storable), Pump Housing (100 units in stock), Standard Gasket G-100 (0 units in stock - simulating a shortage), and Premium Gasket G-200 (100 units available). A Bill of Materials is created for the pump requiring 1 Housing + 1 Standard Gasket. The user must create a Manufacturing Order for 1 pump unit, unlock it, substitute the unavailable Standard Gasket G-100 with the available Premium Gasket G-200, and complete the production. All metadata values match the setup implementation exactly.
